pages.text: Stuck in the End? The $(item)Return Portal Skyseed$() is the way home. Plant it on the End's end stone and a small obsidian-framed shrine grows around an $(o)exit portal$() — step in and it drops you back in the overworld, the same way beating the dragon would.$(br2)$(bold)Materials$()$(br)Only what the End already gives you: $(item)end stone$() (mine it) and $(item)ender pearls$() (from the endermen). No trip back to the Nether required.
End stone and ender pearls, ringed.

$(bold)Stepping through$()$(br)The shrine's gateway is a real End exit portal, so it lands you wherever you last slept (or world spawn). Pack a few Skyseeds before you go — the overworld grows empty too.$(br2)And like the dragon's own portal, the first trip out may roll the $(o)end credits$(). You earned them.
